title: geum japonicum var. chinense
intro: Geum japonicum var. chinense, also known as Chinese avens or Chinense geum, is a variety of flowering plant in the rose family that is native to East Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds that have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system, making it a popular remedy for conditions such as fever, sore throats, and skin irritations. Geum japonicum var. chinense can be consumed as a tea, used in infusions, or taken as a capsule in herbal preparations.
